entry.title: Welcome
entry.summary: Welcome to my corner of the internet, where I share my adventures in game development, with a particular focus on Unreal Engine.
entry.content:
Welcome to my corner of the internet, where I share my adventures in game development, with a particular focus on Unreal Engine.

I’m currently working professionally on Wardogs, but I’m always tinkering with new ideas, exploring techniques, and building side projects along the way.
